title: Defile Apoli Mixin Fix
description: Fixes a crash when using Defile alongside Origins/Apoli on Minecraft 1.20.1.
body:
Fixes a crash when using Defile alongside Origins/Apoli on Minecraft 1.20.1.  
Specifically a NullPointerException crash caused by Defile's perspective mixin firing before the player is loaded.

If this doesn't work then you probably did something else idk.
